font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">data-*</code>, you should use an<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">HTML Sanitizer</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>library. These tools are designed to parse "dirty" HTML and return a clean version based on a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">whitelist</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>of tags and attributes you actually want to keep.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">DOMPurify</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>(JavaScript/Node.js):</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>This is the industry standard for client-side and server-side cleaning. It is extremely fast and secure. By default, it allows some data attributes, but you can easily configure it to strip everything except what you specify.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span><a rel="noopener" href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/sanitize-html" style="color: var(--JKqx2); text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">sanitize-html</a></span><span>&nbsp;</span>(Node.js):</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Highly popular for applications where you need strict control over which tags and attributes are allowed. It is particularly good at cleaning up the "messy" HTML generated when users copy and paste from Microsoft Word or other rich text editors.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">Bleach</span><span>&nbsp;</span>(Python):</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>If you are working in a Python environment, Bleach is the go-to library for stripping unwanted tags and attributes while handling unclosed tags and other common paste issues.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> clean = sanitizeHtml(dirtyHtml, {

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Any tag or attribute not in these lists is discarded.</span><span>
});
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Why not use Regex?<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">Avoid using Regular Expressions (Regex) to strip HTML. font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;h1&gt;</code>-<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;p&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>for paragraphs, and<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;ul&gt;</code>/<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;li&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>for lists.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Semantic Formatting:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Keep<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;strong&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(bold),<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;em&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(italics), and<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;u&gt;</code><span>&nbsp;</span>(underline) as these carry the user's intended emphasis.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Functional Attributes:</strong></span><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">position: absolute</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">width: 1000px</code>, or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">z-index: 9999</code><span>&nbsp;</span>which can hide your own UI or cause horizontal scrolling.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Security Risks:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Some older browsers can execute JavaScript within CSS (e.g.,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">expression()</code>), and styles can be used to load external tracking URLs via<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">background-image: url(...)</code>.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Accessibility:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Relying solely on<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">style</code><span>&nbsp;</span>for formatting (like making text red instead of using a heading tag) makes the content unreadable for screen readers.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">ALLOWED_ATTR</code><span>&nbsp;</span>whitelist.<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">typescript</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">import</span><span> DOMPurify </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">from</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'isomorphic-dompurify'</span><span>;

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> dirtyHtml = </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">`&lt;div class="remove-me" data-foo="bar"&gt;
                    &lt;p style="color: red;"&gt;Hello &lt;b&gt;World&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/p&gt;
                    &lt;script&gt;alert('xss')&lt;/script&gt;
                   &lt;/div&gt;`</span><span>;

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> cleanHtml = DOMPurify.sanitize(dirtyHtml, {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Only allow structural and semantic tags</span><span>
  ALLOWED_TAGS: [</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'p'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'b'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'i'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'strong'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'em'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'br'</span><span>],
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Only allow specific attributes (strips class, data-*, etc. automatically)</span><span>
  ALLOWED_ATTR: [</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'style'</span><span>], 
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Optional: Whitelist only specific CSS properties within the style attribute</span><span>
  FORBID_ATTR: [], </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// default is empty</span><span>
  ALLOW_UNKNOWN_PROTOCOLS: </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">false</span><span>,
});

console.log(cleanHtml); 
</span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Output: &lt;p style="color: red;"&gt;Hello &lt;b&gt;World&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/p&gt;</span><span>
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; text-decoration-line: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: var(--JKqx2); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); text-underline-offset: 1px; font-weight: 500; outline: 0px;">Cure53</a></span>, it is specifically built to prevent Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and other advanced vulnerabilities.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Performance:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>It is much faster than parser-heavy alternatives because it uses the browser's existing engine when possible.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Type Safety:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>It has excellent<span>&nbsp;</span><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;">TypeScript support</span>, ensuring your configurations are type-checked during development.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">typescript</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">import</span><span> DOMPurify </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">from</span><span> </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'isomorphic-dompurify'</span><span>;

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> uiPreservingConfig = {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Use the pre-curated HTML profile for safe structural tags</span><span>
  USE_PROFILES: { html: </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">true</span><span> },
  
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Whitelist only attributes that contribute to look &amp; function</span><span>
  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Strips 'class', 'id', and all 'data-*' attributes automatically</span><span>
  ALLOWED_ATTR: [
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'style'</span><span>,     </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Preserves colors, fonts, margins</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'href'</span><span>,      </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Keeps links working</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'src'</span><span>,       </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Keeps images/media visible</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'alt'</span><span>,       </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Accessibility</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'width'</span><span>,     </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Physical layout</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'height'</span><span>,    </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Physical layout</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'colspan'</span><span>,   </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Critical for table structure</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'rowspan'</span><span>    </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Critical for table structure</span><span>
  ],

  </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Security: Prevent CSS-based attacks while keeping styles</span><span>
  ALLOW_UNKNOWN_PROTOCOLS: </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">false</span><span>,
  SAFE_FOR_TEMPLATES: </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">true</span><span>,
};

</span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> cleanHtml = DOMPurify.sanitize(dirtyPaste, uiPreservingConfig);
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; margin-top: 3px; overflow: hidden; padding: 12px 16px;"><div style="font-size: 12px;">Use code with caution.</div><button style="margin: 0px; background: none; color: inherit; border: none; font: inherit; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer; height: 44px; width: 44px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border-radius: 50%;"></button></div></div></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Why this works for your goals:<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Minimal Effort:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>You don't have to list every tag (like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;div&gt;</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;span&gt;</code>,<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">&lt;table&gt;</code>) because<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">USE_PROFILES: { html: true }</code><span>&nbsp;</span>handles the heavy lifting of allowing safe HTML5 elements.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Automatic Stripping:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Because<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">ALLOWED_ATTR</code><span>&nbsp;</span>acts as a strict whitelist, any attribute not in that list (like<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">class="nav-item"</code><span>&nbsp;</span>or<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">data-id="123"</code>) is instantly removed.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Table Safety:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Most "copy-pasted" UI breaks because table-specific attributes (<code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">colspan</code>) are removed. Including them in<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">ALLOWED_ATTR</code><span>&nbsp;</span>ensures the layout remains intact.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 65.7188px;"><img id="img-xcK9ac-QPNas5NoP8d61oQE_257" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="GitHub" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">GitHub</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+1</span></span></div></button></span></span></li></ul><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Advanced: Handling the "Style Mess"<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">If the pasted content has "too much" style (e.g., it brings over a weird background color you don't want), you can use a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Hook</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>to clean the<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">style</code><span>&nbsp;</span>attribute further. For example, if you want to keep colors but strip<span>&nbsp;</span><code dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 4px;">position: absolute</code><span>&nbsp;</span>which often breaks modern layouts:<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" disabled="true" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div></div><div style="margin-block: 24px 32px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--jINu6c); font-weight: 400;"><div><div style="background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 4px; overflow: auto hidden; padding: 12px 16px 0px;"><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; letter-spacing: 0px;">typescript</div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; font-size: 14px; line-height: 22px; overflow-x: auto;"><pre><code><span>DOMPurify.addHook(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'afterSanitizeAttributes'</span><span>, (node) =&gt; {
  </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">if</span><span> (node </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">instanceof</span><span> HTMLElement &amp;&amp; node.hasAttribute(</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'style'</span><span>)) {
    </span><span style="color: rgb(154, 160, 166); font-style: italic;">// Optional: Filter out specific CSS properties that break layouts</span><span>
    </span><span style="color: rgb(197, 138, 249);">const</span><span> forbiddenProps = [</span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'position'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'top'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'left'</span><span>, </span><span style="color: rgb(129, 201, 149);">'z-index'</span><span>];
    forbiddenProps.forEach(prop =&gt; node.style.removeProperty(prop));
  }
});
</span></code></pre></div></div><div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border: 1px solid var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 4px 4px 16px 16px; }
